text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Tama, do you think you could teach me the trick to your okonomiyaki some time?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Oh, well there's a first. I'm usually the one asking you for help.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No matter how many times I try,
I can't seem to get it right.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… Gotta admit, this feels good.
All right, I'll teach ya!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: But be warned, I'm a strict teacher!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Of course. Thank you very much!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll make the perfect one, blooow on it
to cool it down, and then feed it to you
myself…

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I wonder what sort of face
you'll make when you taste it♪
